title: Make.com Webhook Configuration for Social Media Automation
description: Configuration details for triggering the automated blog and social media generation workflow via Make.com.

payload_structure.photo_url: https://drive.google.com/uc?id=IMAGE_ID (or any public accessible image URL)

setup_instructions: 1. In Make.com, add an 'HTTP - Make a request' module at the end of your Google Drive watch trigger.
2. Set URL to your Supabase Edge Function webhook-handler URL.
4. Under Headers, add 'Authorization' with 'Bearer [YOUR_SUPABASE_KEY]'. Add 'Content-Type' with 'application/json'.
5. Set Body type to 'Raw', Content type to 'JSON'.
6. In the Request content box, map the Google Drive module variables: { "photo_url": "{{1.webContentLink}}", "filename": "{{1.name}}" }
7. Enable 'Parse response' to handle the JSON reply.

error_handling.retry_logic: Configure Make.com 'Break' or 'Incomplete Executions' settings to retry up to 3 times on 500-level HTTP errors. Ensure timeout is set to at least 45 seconds to allow APIs to process.
